_doc: REVL-01 dimension reconciliation between v1.2 reasoning prose rubric and eval_judge rubric. Checked-in artifact: parser AND gate read from here (council Option 3, 2026-05-30). Empirically derived from data/reasoning_dataset/openai_val.jsonl (85/85 CoT judge rows). Phase 7/10 may extend; do not re-litigate silently.

clean_mapped_dims._doc: Reasoning-prose dimension label -> eval_judge internal key. 6 unambiguous. Per-dim Spearman computed ONLY on these (SOFT).

excluded_reasoning_dims._doc: Emitted by reasoning prose but no clean eval_judge equivalent. Parsed + logged with provenance, NOT scored, NOT silently zero-weighted.
excluded_reasoning_dims.Code Quality: no_clean_eval_equivalent (loosely ~D9_structure; mapping rejected as semantic stretch per council)

absent_from_reasoning_prose._doc: eval_judge dims NOT emitted by reasoning prose output. Cannot be scored from prose model output; rubric_scorer still provides GT for these but model-side is unavailable.
absent_from_reasoning_prose.D6_i18n: reasoning prose emits no I18n line (85/85 CoT rows confirm absent)

gt_provenance._doc: Two-GT design (council). Canonical = rubric_scorer (REVL-01A HARD, feeds Phase7/10 reward). Teacher-target = parsed assistant target (REVL-01B SOFT diagnostic).
